core_payload.content:
# Task: The Atomic Unit of Work

## 1. Role
Task will become a sharper execution atom for N1Hub, carrying enough context, evidence expectation, timing posture, and dependency clarity to support a predictive operating system for action.

## 2. Future Task Contract
Tasks will improve in decomposition quality, effort realism, definition-of-done discipline, dependency semantics, branch targeting, reminder coupling, and coordination between human assignees and bounded agent lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Execution quality will improve because the smallest useful work unit will stop being vague. Tasks will remain clear enough to track, delegate, review, and complete honestly across human and agent effort.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Task supports To Dig Deep by making atomic work clearer, more accountable, and more useful instead of merely more numerous.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Task defines the future sharper execution atom for N1Hub: stronger decomposition quality, clearer dependency semantics, richer definition-of-done discipline, better effort expectations, explicit branch targeting, and tighter coordination with reminder, tracker, and delegation flows.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
